V0445_01_00_00_0.text: Not even a deity can defeat me - but you think you can?

V0445_01_00_01_0.text:
I know how this story goes.
And you won’t like the ending!

V0445_01_00_02_0.text: I won't just end you - I'll end your whole world!

V0445_01_00_03_0.text:
This isn't your lucky day.
Because you have to Duel me!

V0445_01_00_04_0.text: Take a breath and enjoy the final moments of your existence!

V0445_01_00_05_0.text: You're not going anywhere - except down!

V0445_01_00_06_0.text: Once I crush you, your powers will be mine!

V0445_01_00_07_0.text:
I exterminated you years ago.
And now I get to do it again!

V0445_01_00_08_0.text: Instead of talking, let’s skip to the part where I end you!

V0445_03_00_00_0.text: Every moment you suffer is another moment I enjoy!

V0445_03_00_01_0.text:
Do you know what you can do?
Nothing - that's what!

V0445_03_00_05_0.text:
Mark my words!
You're still going to lose in the end!

V0445_05_00_00_0.text: You've only seen a sliver of my strength - until now!

V0445_06_01_03_0.text: That's not even close to adequate!

V0445_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over the card I Set!

V0445_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0445_16_00_00_0.text: This is where you meet your end while I stay perfectly safe.

V0445_21_00_00_0.text: There's only one thing you can do - give up!

V0445_21_00_01_0.text: I'll take my time to grind you down into nothing!

V0445_21_00_04_0.text: You will not make a mockery of me!

V0445_21_00_05_0.text: When I said this Duel would be rough, I didn't mean for me!

V0445_28_00_00_0.text:
Are you sad?
You must be sad.
Please tell me you're sad!

V0445_28_00_01_0.text: You should be proud to know that you're my favorite toy!

V0445_28_00_03_0.text:
Phew... I actually thought I'd meet my doom.
But nope!

V0445_28_00_04_0.text: It's not my fault that you believe every word I say!

V0445_28_00_04_1.text:
"I serve the Cosmic Crime Unit to protect Astral!"
Hahahaha!

V0445_28_00_05_0.text: Did you actually think you were my friend!?

V0445_28_00_05_1.text: You’re the most trusting simpleton who’s ever lived!

V0445_28_00_06_0.text: How sad it is to perish without leaving a mark in history.

V0445_28_00_06_1.text:
But I forgive you for being so pathetic.
Hahahaha!

V0445_28_00_07_0.text:
Hahahahahaha!
I now have so much power flowing through me!

V0445_28_00_08_0.text: Watching you suffer is my new favorite hobby!

V0445_28_00_09_1.text: Is it because you lost against meeeeeeee?

V0445_28_00_10_0.text:
Hahaha!
Your dragon was as ferocious as an iguana!

V0445_29_00_00_0.text: Don't you dare think you've won the war!

V0445_29_00_01_0.text:
No! No no no no!
My monsters can't be destroyed!

V0445_29_00_02_0.text: It's impossible for me to lose!

V0445_29_00_03_0.text:
You won't get away with this!
No one treats me this way!

V0445_29_00_05_0.text:
I'll do anything to defeat you.
Just you wait!

V0445_29_00_06_0.text: If I'm going down, you're coming with me, Yuma!

V0445_29_00_08_0.text:
This can't be...
I'm supposed to be stronger than you!

V0445_33_00_02_0.text:
No one has my strength!
No one!

V0445_30_00_02_0.text: Let Vector hear your deepest regrets!

V0445_34_00_00_0.text:
This wasn't a mistake.
All part of my master plan.

V0445_34_00_02_0.text: Where's my acting award for pretending to be your friend?

V0445_34_00_03_0.text: It's scary how you do exactly what I want you to do!

V0445_34_00_04_0.text:
You're out of control!
Now who's the big baddie!

V0445_34_00_07_0.text: I devised a point system to decide whether to eliminate you.

V0445_34_00_08_0.text:
Each time you anger me ? 1 point!
Reach a mil and I end you!

V0445_34_00_09_0.text:
Uh oh!
You reached a million points!

V0445_34_00_10_0.text: Is your strategy to not have a strategy?

V0445_34_00_11_0.text:
You think that'll stop me?
Get serious!

V0445_35_00_00_0.text: Things are about to get dicey.

V0445_36_00_01_0.text: Aww! I wish it was my turn!

V0445_36_00_02_0.text: I'll sit back and enjoy the show.

V0445_36_00_04_0.text:
How dare you put me in danger!
Duel harder!

V0445_36_00_05_0.text:
Don't glare at me!
This isn't my fault!

V0445_36_00_06_0.text:
You can do it, Yuma!
I believe in you!
...Hahahahaha!

V0445_36_00_07_0.text: Show me that you're not completely worthless.

V0445_08_00_02_0.text: I activate Rank-Up-Magic - The Seventh One!

V0445_08_00_03_0.text: I'll show you how unstoppable I am!

V0445_08_00_03_1.text: I activate Rank-Up-Magic Admiration of the Thousands!

V0445_08_00_04_0.text: I activate my Quick-Play Spell, Seventh Force!

V0445_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Barian Untopia!

V0445_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Glorious Numbers!

V0445_08_00_09_0.text: I banish Glorious Numbers from my Graveyard!

V0445_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Field Spell, Sargasso the D.D. Battlefield!

V0445_08_00_10_1.text: This dimensional wasteland will be your final destination!

V0445_08_00_11_0.text: Sargasso the D.D. Battlefield's effect activates!

V0445_08_00_12_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Sargasso Lighthouse!

V0445_08_00_12_1.text: I'm now unaffected by Sargasso's effects!

V0445_08_00_13_0.text: Sargasso Lighthouse activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0445_08_00_14_0.text: I could just sit here and beat you, but how fair is that.

V0445_08_00_14_1.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Don Thousand's Throne!

V0445_08_00_15_1.text:
Hahaha!
It's the pick-me-up I need to put you down!

V0445_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate 
Don Thousand's Throne's additional effect!

V0445_08_00_16_1.text: Not only does it stop your attack, it ranks up my monster!

V0445_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Contract with Don Thousand!

V0445_08_00_17_1.text: If you want to Duel me, you have to pay the toll!

V0445_08_00_18_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Vain Betrayer!

V0445_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Corrupted Keys!

V0445_09_00_01_0.text: Masquerade uses 1 Overlay Unit to negate your effect!

V0445_09_00_01_1.text: And as an added bonus, you take damage!

V0445_09_00_02_0.text: If Umbral is Special Summoned, it destroys a Spell or Trap!

V0445_09_00_03_0.text: Umbral uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0445_09_00_04_0.text: Manipulator of Souls uses 1 Overlay Unit to play its effect!

V0445_09_00_05_0.text: Regaining LP activates Manipulator of Souls's effect!

V0445_09_00_06_0.text: High Manipulator of Chaos uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0445_09_00_07_0.text: Doom Chimera Dragon activates its effect when it battles!

V0445_09_00_08_0.text: Chaos Chimera Dragon uses 1 Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0445_09_00_09_0.text: I pay LP to activate Chaos Chimera Dragon's effect!

V0445_09_00_10_0.text: Master Key Beetle uses 1 Overlay Unit to unleash its effect!

V0445_09_00_11_0.text: Djinn Buster uses its Overlay Units to activate its effect!

V0445_09_00_12_0.text: King Overfiend uses 1 Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0445_09_00_13_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Dark Mist's effect!

V0445_09_00_14_0.text: I use 1 Chaos Overlay Unit to activate Dark Storm's effect!

V0445_09_00_16_0.text: Archfiend Seraph uses 1 Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0445_09_00_17_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Ragnafinity's effect!

V0445_09_00_19_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Unform's effect!

V0445_09_00_20_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Ghoul's effect!

V0445_09_00_21_0.text: I activate Umbral Horror Ghost's effect from my hand!

V0445_09_00_22_0.text: Now I activate Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp's effect!

V0445_09_00_23_0.text: Will o' the Wisp activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0445_09_00_24_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Gorgonic Guardian's effect!

V0445_09_00_26_0.text: Gorgonic Gargoyle activates its effect from my hand!

V0445_09_00_27_0.text: Gorgonic Golem activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0445_09_00_28_0.text: I banish Gorgonic Golem from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0445_37_00_00_1.text: Force these foolish insects to grovel at your feet!

V0445_37_00_01_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Appear, Number C104!

V0445_37_00_01_1.text: Barian power assaults the light to delight the darkness!

V0445_37_00_02_0.text:
Number 43!
Give rise to their darkest fears!

V0445_37_00_03_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Show yourself, Number C43!

V0445_37_00_04_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Go, Number C5!

V0445_37_00_04_1.text:
Spirits!
Unite your souls to rise into a world of chaos!

V0445_13_00_06_0.text:
Come here!
Number 66: Master Key Beetle!

V0445_37_00_05_0.text:
Number 65!
Rise to judge this cursed world!

V0445_37_00_06_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
The executor of infinite hate!

V0445_13_00_09_0.text:
Here's the envoy of the shadows!
Number 96: Dark Mist!

V0445_37_00_07_0.text: What was once Dumon's Chaos Number now belongs to me!

V0445_37_00_08_0.text:
This isn't Marin's monster anymore!
It's mine!

V0445_13_00_16_0.text:
Come on out!
Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp!

V0445_13_00_22_0.text: I Special Summon a Manipulator Token!

V0445_13_00_23_0.text: I Special Summon an Umbral Horror Mirage Token!

V0445_19_00_16_0.text:
Umbral Horror Will o' the Wisp! 
Attack!

V0445_19_00_23_0.text: I attack with my Umbral Horror Mirage Token!

V0445_26_00_02_0.text: Is that the best you can do?
